steps.label: Referral Information Entry
steps.description: On this screen, you will enter all the necessary details to initiate a new referral. Please provide accurate information about the individual being referred, including their contact details and the nature and urgency of the concern. Fields marked with an asterisk (*) are required. Use the 'Additional Notes' section to provide any extra context or information that may help the intake specialist. Once all required fields are completed, click 'Submit Referral' to proceed. Your submission will be timestamped and logged for compliance and audit purposes.

fields.label: Middle Name
fields.error_message: Middle Name must be valid text.

fields.label: Phone
fields.error_message: Phone number must be valid format.

fields.label: Email
fields.error_message: Email must be a valid email address.

fields.label: Additional Notes
fields.error_message: Additional Notes must be valid text.

data_validation: First Name and Last Name are required fields.
Phone number must be in valid format (e.g., 10 digits, no letters).
Email must be a valid email address format.
If Nature of Concern is 'Other', details should be provided in Additional Notes.
Urgency Level must be selected before submission.
No duplicate referral allowed for the same person within 24 hours.
Address, if provided, must be a valid postal address.

buttons.label: Submit Referral
buttons.description: Click to submit the referral details for processing. The system will validate your entries, create a new referral record, timestamp the submission, and log the action for audit and compliance.
actions: Trigger Assign to Agency Intake Specialist

steps.label: Submit Referral
steps.description: When the 'Submit Referral' button is clicked by the Referral Worker, the system performs the following: (1) Validates that all required fields are completed; (2) Creates a new referral record with the entered details; (3) Timestamps the submission; (4) Logs the action for audit and compliance purposes; (5) Stores the referral record in the referral database. If any required field is missing, the submission is rejected and an error is displayed.

rules.label: Required Field Validation
rules.logic: System checks that 'First Name', 'Last Name', 'Nature of Concern', 'Urgency Level', and 'Submit Referral' are present and not empty. If any required field is missing, prevent submission and display an error message.

rules.label: Create Referral Record
rules.logic: Upon successful validation, system creates a new referral record using all entered field values.

rules.label: Timestamp Submission
rules.logic: System records the current date and time as the submission timestamp for the referral record.

rules.label: Audit Logging
rules.logic: System logs the submission event, including user ID, timestamp, and entered data, for audit and compliance tracking.

rules.label: Store in Referral Database
rules.logic: System saves the new referral record in the referral database.
